search_document:
User Request: Freight cost analysis.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Freight Cost Trend
Type: chart
Description: Monthly trend of freight costs
Title: Freight Costs by Region
Type: table
Description: Freight costs aggregated by region
Title: Total Freight Costs
Type: kpi
Description: Overall freight costs
Title: Freight Costs by Carrier
Type: chart
Description: Freight costs analysis by shipping carrier
Title: Freight Cost Distribution
Type: pie_chart
Description: Distribution of freight costs across different orders

sql_queries.title: Freight Cost Trend
sql_queries.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', OrderDate) AS Month, SUM(Freight) AS TotalFreight FROM Orders GROUP BY Month ORDER BY Month

sql_queries.title: Freight Costs by Region
sql_queries.sql: SELECT ShipRegion, SUM(Freight) AS TotalFreight FROM Orders GROUP BY ShipRegion

sql_queries.title: Total Freight Costs
sql_queries.sql: SELECT SUM(Freight) AS TotalFreight FROM Orders

sql_queries.title: Freight Costs by Carrier
sql_queries.description: Freight costs analysis by shipping carrier
sql_queries.sql: SELECT Shippers.CompanyName, SUM(Orders.Freight) AS TotalFreight FROM Orders JOIN Shippers ON Orders.ShipVia = Shippers.ShipperID GROUP BY Shippers.CompanyName

sql_queries.title: Freight Cost Distribution
sql_queries.description: Distribution of freight costs across different orders
